title: All together
prompt:
Transform the attached reference image into a cinematic animated storyboard panel for the same campsite and same five teen campers.
Keep the stylized 3D family-friendly character design, expressive faces, hoodie-and-camp wardrobe, warm campfire lighting, cool moonlit forest depth, and tactile camp props from the reference.
Preserve the anchor layout language from the reference whenever the shot allows: central stone fire ring, five logs around the ring, tent in the back-left/back-center zone, lantern in the left foreground, and the Camp Pinewood sign mounted on a tree at the right side of frame.
This is for a suspenseful teen short film, so the mood should feel cozy but uncanny, with strong fire-vs-moon contrast and readable silhouettes.
Deliver a finished storyboard illustration, not a diagram, not a wireframe, not icons, not placeholder geometry, and not a contact-sheet composite.
Keep the shot in wide cinematic 16:9 landscape framing with center-safe action and no text baked into the scene itself.

        Frame ID: f05
        Shot ref: S05
        Shot title: All together
        Story beat: Full ring composition: five logs, tent back-center, sign on right, lantern left.
        Must include: Logs x5; tent center-back; sign right; lantern left
        Lighting target: Healthy fire key; lantern practical warm; moon rim
        Camera cue: Wide establishing

        Specific direction:
        Create the clearest full-ring establishing board: five teens around the fire, tent back-center or back-left, lantern left foreground, Camp Pinewood sign on the right, forest and moon above. This should feel like the strongest direct visual descendant of the supplied reference image.

        Important constraints:
        - Keep the same camp world and same character continuity as the reference image.
        - The result must read as a real storyboard illustration grounded in the provided reference, not as symbolic staging markers.
        - Keep characters teen and PG-13 appropriate.
        - No gore, no monsters in full view, no extra characters beyond the hidden silhouette in frame f07.
        - No captions, labels, UI text, watermarks, split screens, or diagram overlays inside the generated art.
